name: GOLFTEC Oak Brook
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The company utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching for all skill levels. Lessons are structured around a personalized game plan with certified PGA coaches focusing on measurable improvement. Club fittings are also available, using launch monitors and shaft optimization to match players with equipment from major brands like Callaway and TaylorMade.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Certified PGA coaches with a proven improvement system
On-site club fitting with immediate equipment purchase options

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and has a pro shop with equipment available for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being allowed at GOLFTEC locations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time for 18 simulator holes is not specified, but sessions are structured around lesson plans and practice time rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers instruction for juniors and youth golfers with technology and coaching tailored to younger players.
